# 🚀 My Programming Journey

This repository serves as my personal archive of solutions, exercises, and projects I am working on while learning new programming languages.

## 📚 Resources and Platforms

The tasks in this repository are sourced from the following platforms:
* **SPOJ.com** (Sphere Online Judge)
* **Codeforces** & **LeetCode** (Algorithms)
* **input.sk** (Python by Andrej Blaho)
* **Edabit** & **Exercism**
* **AI Generative Problems** (Custom challenges generated by AI)

## 🛠️ Languages Used

* [x] **Python** (Basics and algorithms)
* [ ] **C**
* [ ] **C++**
* [ ] **Rust**
* [ ] **Kotlin**
* [ ] **Java**
* [ ] **HTML & CSS**
* [ ] **JavaScript (JS)**
* [ ] **TypeScript (TS)**
* [ ] *...other languages to be added over time*

## 🎯 Goals

1. Solve at least 3 new problems every week.
2. Master the syntax of multiple languages.
3. Improve logical thinking through algorithmic challenges.

*Created for the joy of coding.*
